ai_summary: Elon Musk announced that Starlink has been deployed on Singapore Airlines, expanding commercial satellite internet connectivity to commercial aviation. This represents a key business milestone for Starlink's commercialization strategy, demonstrating market traction in the premium airline segment and validating the product-market fit for high-altitude connectivity services beyond consumer broadband.
embed_html:
Starlink on Singapore Airlines! 🇸🇬 https://t.co/Y7U8fngwyz

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 4, 2026

parent.name: S.E. Robinson, Jr.
parent.embed_html:
SPACEX / TERAFAB: The County of Grimes, Texas, will be home to SpaceX's Multiphase, next gen, vertically integrated semiconductor manufacturing and advanced computing fabrication facility.

Estimated capital for initial phase is $55 billion. Estimated total investment of $119… https://t.co/wIsT1HwXWy pic.twitter.com/CZo8vK7B88

— S.E. Robinson, Jr. (@SERobinsonJr) May 6, 2026

ai_summary: SpaceX is planning to build TeraFab, a vertically integrated semiconductor manufacturing and advanced computing facility in Grimes County, Texas, with an estimated initial capital investment of $55 billion and total investment of $119 billion, positioning it as the world's largest and most advanced chip fabrication facility. This represents a major strategic expansion into semiconductor manufacturing, a critical vertical integration move for SpaceX to secure computing and chip production capabilities for its aerospace and technology operations.
embed_html:
This is one of several locations under consideration for what will be the largest and most advanced chip fabrication facility in the world

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 6, 2026
